NAVAREA XIX 38/23

 ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT OPERATIONS DAILY IN PERIOND 1800 TO 0200UTC FROM 17 TO 26 APR
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND AVOID FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS

 HOTEL 2
 69-00.0N 012-18.0E
 70-17.0N 016-13.5E
 72-19.5N 013-54.5E
 72-06.0N 005-51.0E
 69-17.0N 006-37.0E

 HOTEL 3
 69-24.3N 016-50.9E
 69-18.6N 016-42.2E
 69-30.9N 015-01.5E
 69-59.9N 015-40.6E
 69-49.8N 016-35.2E
 69-32.4N 017-10.5E

 LIMA 1
 69-55.0N 013-53.0E
 69-16.0N 015-02.0E
 69-38.0N 016-48.0E
 70-16.0N 015-45.0E

 LIMA 2
 69-31.5N 012-53.3E
 69-05.5N 014-15.0E
 69-38.0N 016-48.0E
 70-10.6N 015-53.5E
 70-37.0N 015-48.3E
 70-18.7N 013-28.6E

 FOR STATUS UPDATES OR NEED FOR TRANSIT INSIDE THE AREAS VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT ANDOYA SPACE ON VHF CH 14 OR 16.
 IF OUTSIDE VHF RANGE OF LAUNCH SITE USE PHONE NO +47 7614 4426
 ANDOYA SPACE RANGE CONTROL WILL BE MANNED 3 HOURS PRIOR TO START OF ACTIVITIES
 FOR DAILY UPDATES SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO
 REFER TO EFS 7/23
